creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 219495
Patch for libbluray

Update libbluray to 1.2.1
Clean up Makefile
Import patch from openSUSE

Ref:
https://build.opensuse.org/package/view_file/multimedia:libs/libbluray/libbluray-java9.patch

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r364979 (amd64) (make + make check-plist) (with and without Java)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64) (with and without Java)
